description: An operator needs to generate an optimized collection route for a waste management truck based on real-time smart bin fill levels.

nodes.task_description: Identify the designated collection zone for 'Truck 7'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the geographic zone for the specified truck.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the fill levels for all smart bins within that zone that are over the 80% threshold.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a list of specific bins that require collection.

nodes.task_description: Generate the most efficient route to service only the identified high-fill-level bins.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully generates and sends the optimized route to the truck's navigation system.
